hero.description: a robotics software developer focused on autonomous systems, mobile robotics, and robotic arm control. I have hands-on experience with ROS2 navigation, SLAM, IoT systems, and computer vision, including training models like YOLOv4-Tiny, YOLOv8-Nano, and FastSCNN.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur (IIITDMJ)

about.description:
I am a pre-final year Mechanical Engineering student at the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Jabalpur, with a strong focus on robotics and autonomous systems. My work spans across software and hardware, combining programming, CAD design, and embedded systems to build intelligent robotic solutions.

I have hands-on experience in developing ROS2-based systems for navigation, SLAM, and robotic manipulation, along with implementing computer vision pipelines for perception tasks such as detection and segmentation. I also work with IoT and edge devices to deploy real-time robotic applications.

During my internship at Vaayu Robotics, I worked on processing and managing large-scale drone data, where I built automated pipelines to handle and optimize high-resolution imagery for real-world inspection systems, gaining practical exposure to cloud-based data workflows and scalable systems.

skills.items: Jetson AGX Xavier, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Arduino

tasks: Developed and implemented a classification algorithm to process approximately 15 GB of raw, shuffled drone imagery, automatically identifying and sorting scrambled photos into distinct, tower-specific folders.

Engineered this automated data pipeline to handle thousands of incoming images, significantly reducing manual sorting efforts and optimizing the dataset quality for critical infrastructure inspection models.

projects.title: AMR with LiDAR
projects.description: Deployed a ROS2-based SLAM and navigation stack on a differential-drive AMR using 2D LiDAR for real-time mapping.

projects.title: VLA Robotic Arm
projects.description: Built a ROS2 + MoveIt2 manipulation pipeline for a 5-DOF arm using a local LLaMA 3B model for natural language commands.

projects.title: Crack Detection Bot
projects.description: Developed an in-pipe inspection robot with a custom YOLOv4-Tiny model reaching 30 FPS; filed a patent for the modular design.

leadership.title: Co-coordinator | Electronics and Robotics Society (ERS)
leadership.description: Organized 20+ technical workshops and mentored 180+ students in robotics and computer vision.

leadership.title: Achievements
leadership.description:
• e-Yantra (IIT Bombay): Ranked Top-16 nationwide in the KrishCobot theme.
• Vishwakarma Awards: Semi-finalist (Top 40/1012 teams) for VLA-based pick-and-place robot.
• DD Robocon 2025 (IIT Delhi): Qualified Stage 1.
• e-Toycathon (C-DAC): National Finalist (among top 112 teams).
